| |
## Patriot,

Nancy Pelosi and the socialist Democrats have caved to their radical base and support defunding the police, eliminating private healthcare, and AOC’s job-killing Green New Deal.

**It’s imperative we take back control of the US House** to deliver President Trump’s agenda and return our economy to its historic performance.
---
| [RUSH A SECURE DONATION >>](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=e42dbb2082&e=e4728463fc "RUSH A SECURE DONATION >>")
---
|
## **Troy Nehls is just the man** to do it in Texas’ 22nd Congressional District. He’s a US Army veteran and law and order Sheriff who’s strong on the military, the border, and the economy.

His socialist opponent made this seat a close contest in 2018 and wants _AOC’s socialized healthcare_. The socialist Democrats are pouring millions into this seat to try and flip it.
---
|
## **Rush a contribution to Troy Nehls now** to keep this seat in Republican hands and send Troy Nehls to Congress take on Nancy Pelosi and the socialist Democrats.

******\- Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy**

name: Biden for President
subject: VP pick >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The first woman to serve as Vice President in American history. |
---
Peter --

**We 'll make this real quick.**

For the past few months, we've been sending our supporters the exclusive opportunity to get on the list to be the first to know about who Joe's running mate will be!

We believe you've received some of these emails, Peter. We're hoping you don't pass on this opportunity again!

When Joe selects his running mate, he'll be selecting the first woman to serve as Vice President in American history. **_This moment is history, Peter, and we want you to be a special part of it._**

[**Add your name here before time runs out to be one of the first to learn about Joe 's pick when we're ready to break the news »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec57f/313926051/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopeners_RS") | **GET ON THE LIST TO LEARN ABOUT JOE 'S VP PICK FIRST**

**Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec57f/313926051/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopeners_RS") **On the List?** No, not yet!
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec57d/313926051/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopeners_RS")
---
We can't wait to share this big announcement with you when we're ready to announce it! We hope you'll be on the list of supporters who hear the news first!

Thanks for being a part of the team,

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec57b/313926051/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec579/313926051/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec575/313926051/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec573/313926051/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec570/313926051/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec56e/313926051/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec56d/313926051/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec56b/313926051/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec568/313926051/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec567/313926051/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec56d/313926051/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec566/313926051/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec56b/313926051/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad2/1cd0ac28/17eb99cd5/357ec565/313926051/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Did you see the huge news?
body:
Bill Hagerty won Tennessee's Republican primary!
Peter,Thanks to the incredible support of grassroots conservatives like you, Bill Hagerty won Tennessee's Republican U.S. Senate primary last night!Now our next challenge begins. President Trump is counting on us to win this fall and **we're counting on your support. **Can you [**donate right now and help us win in November?**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-r/) [DONATE $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-y/) [DONATE $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-j/) [DONATE $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-t/) [DONATE $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-i/) We need strong conservative Senators who will not kowtow to the angry liberal mob that is tearing apart the fabric of the America we love.**President Trump won 't stand for it, and neither will Bill.**If you can, **[please ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-d/)**[**donate and help send Bill to the Senate.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-u/) Thank you for your support.Team Hagerty | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-o/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-b/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-n/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phktrid-fuutjhhtj-p/)

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update July 31 - Aug 7
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A917)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK

As election day draws nearer it becomes increasingly important that each and every one of us talk to our friends and neighbors about what we face at the polls this election cycle. And mind you, this has nothing to do with a "political" conversation - or it certainly doesn’t have to. This is about every American’s vote COUNTING. Republican, Democrat, Independent...no matter what you or your neighbor believes, all of us have the right as Americans for our vote to count.
What so many Americans don’t realize is that if they vote by mail this election - as almost everyone seems to be urging nowadays - it’s highly likely their vote doesn’t make it to the ballot box. We have already seen it all over the place - New York, Pennsylvania, New Jersey and beyond - hundreds of thousands of ballots not counted or invalidated because of unprepared and ill-equipped election processes.
I talked at length about this on my podcast this week, especially how the issue is playing out in the state of Nevada and has already played out in New York, with 80,000 ballots that went uncounted in the recent primary. I hope you will listen. Please, share this message with those you know and urge them this election to vote in person on election day. It is the only way to guarantee that your vote counts and is counted.
Onward,
Catherine

---
| |
---
|
---
| | CATCH OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE, & TRUE
---
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | THIS WEEK | EPISODE 12 | November is Coming...
Subscribe to the podcast today to get notice as soon as new episodes post. [Apple | Spotify | You Tube ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A940)

PREVIOUS EPISODES:
EPISODE 11 | The Truth About Soros, BLM, and Elections. [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A919)
Episode 10 | TX Attorney General Ken Paxton. [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A920)
Episode 9 | Debbie D’Souza [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A921)
Episode 8 | Citizen Watchdog Colleen Vera [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A922)
Episode 7 | Dinesh D'Souza [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A923)

To see all previous episodes please visit [here](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A924).

---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | NEWS TO KNOW

****[1\. President Trump warns it could take years to get election results with mass-mailed ballots](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A936) President Trump warned that if states like Nevada are allowed to send mail-in ballots to all registered voters, it could take "years" to get the results from November's election. He claimed that the infrastructure is not there for such a large-scale operation. The president pointed to a congressional primary election in New York that has resulted in weeks of vote counting after voters mailed in their ballots.

2[. Over 80,000 mail-in ballots disqualified in NYC primary mess](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A938) The city Board of Elections received 403,103 mail-in ballots for the June 23 Democratic presidential primary. But the certified results released Wednesday revealed that only 318,995 mail-in ballots were counted. That means 84,108 ballots were not counted or invalidated — 21 percent of the total. One out of four mail-in ballots were disqualified for arriving late, lacking a postmark or failing to include a voter’s signature, or other defects. The Post reported Tuesday [that roughly 30,000](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A937) mail-in ballots were invalidated in Brooklyn alone.

3\. [U.S. Puts $10 Million Bounty on 2020 Election Hackers](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=95A140A14A939) The Trump administration will offer up to $10 million to any individual who provides information about foreign hackers who seek to influence the outcome of the 2020 election. The reward is available under the State Department's Rewards for Justice program to anyone who can provide the United States with "information leading to the identification or location of any person who works with or for a foreign government for the purpose of interfering with U.S. elections through certain illegal cyber activities." The United States is seeking the identifying information of perpetrators of interference in "any U.S. federal, state, or local election," according to the State Department. The Trump administration vowed to prosecute any person who aims to commit computer fraud relating to the elections, including hacking into electronic voter records and polling sites.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: President Trump Congratulates Bill Hagerty On Election Win!
body:
Peter,In case you missed it, President Donald J. Trump just congratulated Bill Hagerty on his Tennessee Senate Republican Primary victory last night!In his [tweet](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phkdkky-fuutjhhtj-r/), President Trump said, Bill will be "Strong on Crime, Military, our Vets and the Second Amendment." [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phkdkky-fuutjhhtj-y/) Thank you again for your continued support of Bill Hagerty's campaign for United States Senate, we greatly appreciate it.But now more than ever, we need your help to elect strong conservatives to the Senate who will stand alongside President Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to push back against the angry liberal mob and their Socialist agenda.In the Senate, Bill will fight to protect our Tennessee conservative values that we hold dear, such as the right to life and our Second Amendment.Thank you again for your continued support.Best,
Abigail Sigler
Communications Director | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phkdkky-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phkdkky-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phkdkky-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phkdkky-fuutjhhtj-d/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

body:
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Hey friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw this note from Senator Harris. I am so proud to have spent my time as Auditor General fighting for accountability and transparency to make the lives of Pennsylvania families better.

**With your support, we can take that fight to Washington, friend.

[If you can, will you chip in now to help us with this ultra competitive race and flip PA-10 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18600328/233635601/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.08_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=727b34df-87d9-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjdiMzRkZi04N2Q5LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvytwdpto-Iz76NKG-wl3C78IY2cM-vL2P5SCj8TdIM=)** | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18600329/233635602/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.08_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=727b34df-87d9-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjdiMzRkZi04N2Q5LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvytwdpto-Iz76NKG-wl3C78IY2cM-vL2P5SCj8TdIM=)

Eugene
\--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Kamala Harris**
Date: Fri, Aug 7, 2020 at 3:34 PM
Subject: Let me tell you about Eugene DePasquale

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18600330/233635603/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.08_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=727b34df-87d9-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjdiMzRkZi04N2Q5LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvytwdpto-Iz76NKG-wl3C78IY2cM-vL2P5SCj8TdIM=)
Hi friend,

**I am proud to endorse Eugene in his race to represent Pennsylvania’s 10th District in Congress.**

Eugene is a fighter with a proven track record of bringing accountability and transparency to government to make the lives of hard-working Pennsylvania families better. As PA’s Auditor General, he nearly eliminated the backlog of rape kits, protected children from abuse, and saved taxpayers millions of dollars by taking on wasteful spending.

[**That’s exactly the kind of leadership we need in Congress, friend, and it’s why I’m proud to be on Team Eugene. Friend, justice is on the ballot this November. And we can restore justice to our democratic systems by fighting to hold those in power accountable and for transparency at all levels of government. **There is no doubt in my mind that Eugene is the best person to stand on the side of justice for South Central Pennsylvanians.**

subject: Singh Says AG is Compromised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
As Tens of Thousands of Votes Remain Uncounted, Transparency and Accuracy at Stake | | | Dear Friend,

Phil Murphy, his minions, and the RINOs in our party are trying to steal the senate nomination.

**[But I'm not going to let them and I need your help](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=544c4b9cbc&e=3e017fab0f).**

It's now been 1 month since Election Day, and the Republican contest for U.S. Senate remains completely up in the air.

## Earlier this week, we were told Middlesex County was done counting... then we find out more than ten thousand votes are _still_ being counted today. The nonstop lies from the media and political officials charged with giving the public the truth is just ridiculous.

Murphy's Democrat Attorney General Gubir Grewal is fighting us tooth-and-nail in every county, in every hearing, to falsely certify the race before it's over and stop our efforts to ensure every vote is counted in an honest and transparent recount.

In spite of Phil Murphy and Grewal's machinations, we've managed to stay ahead in the fight because of contributions from patriots like you. But we still need more support to ensure every vote is counted.
---
| [DEMAND RECOUNT NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=691c23a6f9&e=3e017fab0f "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW")
---
| But Murphy and Grewal know that if they can terminate this election before all the votes are counted, they can do the same in November and deliver the state to Cory Booker — **and every congressional district to Democrats as well.**

I can't do this alone. I need your financial support _TODAY_ , because we're combating the Attorney General on every front.

This election will set the stage for future elections in America. We cannot afford to let it fall into the hands of the radical left. They are scared of losing their power — and they should be. With your help, we'll make sure their time is up.

-Hirsh

PS: [With your support](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=d1fc924f89&e=3e017fab0f), we'll hold the radical left accountable and ensure every vote is counted in the fight for the U.S. Senate nomination.
---
| [DEMAND RECOUNT NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=72dc622a28&e=3e017fab0f "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW")
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c8832fc6ef&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|

| August 7th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Singh Says AG is Compromised
#### _As Tens of Thousands of Votes Remain Uncounted, Transparency and Accuracy at Stake_

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Hirsh Singh, the conservative candidate seeking the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate is pitted in a tug-of-war with Governor Phil Murphy's Attorney General Gurbir S. Grewal over the failed vote-by-mail election held on July 7th.

"Tens of thousands of ballots remain uncounted, rejected or lost, disenfranchising tens of thousands of New Jersey voters," Singh said. "But Phil Murphy's Attorney General couldn't care less because he's more interested in representing the interests of Phil Murphy than the interests of the people."

Singh, who recently filed for a recount in the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate, has been appearing before Superior Court judges in each of New Jersey's 21 counties. While recounts have been approved in three counties so far, Attorney General Grewal's office has been fighting tooth and nail to stop the recounts or impose draconian fees in order to conduct them.

"The AG's office is completely and utterly compromised," Singh said. "Phil Murphy is hellbent on ending in-person voting and imposing vote-by-mail permanently, so the Attorney General's Office is doing everything they can to hide how much of a failure the July 7th election has been."

Singh said that more than four weeks after Election Day, counties remain unable or unwilling to provide basic information about the election, such as:
* How many mail-in votes were received before or after the deadline;
* How many mail-in votes were rejected and why;
* How many mail-in voters were given the opportunity to "cure" their ballots and how many voters did so;
* How many provisional votes were received;
* How many provisional votes were rejected and why;
* How many votes that were intended to be counted remain uncounted and when that initial count will ever be done;
* How many ballots with clear markings were not tallied by scanners; and
* How many ballots were counted despite bearing July 8th postmarks.

"If elections officials cannot manage a relatively small number of votes in a primary election," Singh wondered, "How will they ever manage two, three, or four times as many in November?"

Media reports indicate that over 27,000 ballots were rejected in the July 7th election, however, Hudson County alone is said to have rejected over 6,000 ballots.

"The people of New Jersey deserve fair, open and honest elections," Singh declared. "But the Attorney General's Office isn't fighting for that. Instead, they are pursuing a political vendetta against our campaign that began with bullying tactics. It continues today as they seek to wield influence over judges who are being asked to approve the recounts."

Singh will be heard by judges in two more counties later today and said he expects decisions on recounts in two other counties to be handed down imminently.

"We will not stop fighting for every properly cast vote to be transparently and accurately counted," Singh said. "It's shameful that we can't count on the Attorney General to do the same."
---

## New York AG sues to dissolve the NRA
New York state is suing to dissolve the National Rifle Association, according to a lawsuit filed on Thursday, presenting a new, major threat to the country’s biggest gun rights group just months before the presidential election.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I need to know your thoughts about health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Please don't share your personal survey link.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e63/7f51f7bc/408cbcdd/4ef78522/3442565515/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e63/7f51f7bc/408cbcdd/4ef78521/3442565515/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-augACAS")
---
One of the biggest things I hear about from Texans is health care. From figuring out how they'll get insurance coverage, to the sky-high cost of prescription medications, to the disastrous mismanagement of the COVID-19 pandemic. I want to make sure I get a chance to hear from you too. **So will you take two minutes to take my health care survey?**

Sen. Cornyn was labeled health care "Repeal's Top Salesman" by Politico because he worked so hard to try to gut the Affordable Care Act. Now, as COVID-19 continues to rage in Texas, he's repeatedly made jokes about the pandemic and spread dangerous misinformation -- like when he said we're not sure whether kids can transmit the coronavirus and that none had died from it.

I think we deserve better, but I want to know what you think. **[Will you take my quick survey and let me know?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e63/7f51f7bc/408cbcdd/4ef78521/3442565515/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-augACAS")**

Our healthcare is crucial, and we can't afford to leave it to Sen. Cornyn to protect.
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e63/7f51f7bc/408cbcdd/4ef78520/3442565515/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200808.1__1874__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e63/7f51f7bc/408cbcdd/4ef78527/3442565515/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1874&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e63/7f51f7bc/408cbcdd/4ef78526/3442565515/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Weekly wrap-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
We've had another exciting and action packed week on the campaign trail. With less than 90 days until Election Day, I'm really feeling the momentum and enthusiasm from voters across the 32nd Congressional District.

Before I discuss more about our campaign, I want to take a moment to recognize **Purple Heart Day**. On August 7th every year, we recognize and **honor the brave men and women who were either wounded on the battlefield or paid the ultimate sacrifice with their lives.**

I believe that as grateful Americans, it is important for us to do everything we can to **thank and support our incredible veterans** , not just on days like today, but each and every day.
---
|
---
| [ ](mailto:eevents.collinsfortx@gmail.com?subject=Grassroots%20Update%20Call)
---
| Please join me and my team next **Wednesday, 8/12 at 6:30 PM for a virtual update on the state of the race to take back district 32** , what we’ve accomplished thus far, and opportunities to get involved with our campaign as we come down the homestretch! Kindly RSVP to [events.collinsfortx@gmail.com](mailto:events.collinsfortx@gmail.com) for Zoom and call-in details.
---
|
---
|
### EverybodyEatz
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Finally, I want to make you aware of EveryoneEatz, an organization based in North Texas that has provided **hundreds of thousands of completely free meals and free COVID-19 tests for underprivileged** residents across our area.

I have partnered with them in the past to spread the word about their organization across the community, and I linked up with them again yesterday to help distribute meals in a safe manner for those in need. Yesterday was even declared "EveryoneEatz Day" in Texas. It's a great organization supporting a great cause, and I'm excited to do what I can to contribute.

I hope you have a great weekend, and I look forward to keeping you up to date with everything that goes on in the coming week!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Does Dem AG nominee support attack on the NRA?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The AG of New York is using the NRA. Todd Rokita will be an attorney general that fights to protect your rights, not take them away. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/does-dem-ag-nominee-support-attack-on-the-nra?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e4d7ab90c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d5aa78e1b2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Earlier this week we received a stark reminder of just how important a state’s attorney general’s office is and why we must keep it Republican in Indiana by electing Todd Rokita.

The attorney general of New York, to burnish her radical, far-left resume, is using the power of her office to sue the largest pro-Second Amendment organization in the country, the National Rifle Association. **Her goal is the total elimination of this organization.**

While this lawsuit is occurring in New York, it is a threat to responsible gun owners everywhere. It also begs the question:

**Does Democrat Jonathan Weinzapfel support this attack on the Second Amendment?**

This is what’s on the line in this race and this is exactly why **we need to elect Todd Rokita as Indiana’s next Attorney General.**
[**\-- > Donate NOW to ELECT an AG to fight for our rights! <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fbd63d6983&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Todd will be an attorney general that fights to protect your rights,__not take them away.__**

Jonathan Weinzapfel has a far-left voting record and only has a “C” rating on gun rights from the NRA.

Does Weinzapfel want Indiana to follow New York? Will he use the office to attack the Second Amendment, dissolve the NRA, and leave you unable to hunt and protect your family?

Todd Rokita has always—and will always—stand up and defend your constitutional rights. Liberal attorneys general, like the one in New York and the type Weinzapfel would be, can’t be trusted to do the same.

The choice is clear.

Thank you,
-Your Indiana Republican Party
---
| [Donate NOW to fight for our rights! >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f5eb6dbd09&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Donate NOW to fight for our rights! >>")

Does Weinzapfel want Indiana to follow New York? Will he use the office to attack the Second Amendment, dissolve the NRA, and leave you unable to hunt and protect your family? Todd Rokita has always—and will always—stand up and defend your constitutional rights. Liberal attorneys general, like the one in New York and the type Weinzapfel would be, can’t be trusted to do the same. The choice is clear. Thank you, -Your Indiana Republican Party | "Donate NOW to fight for our rights! >>" | | id:2020-04-28-19:45:12:543t | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Virginia’s most important 2020 race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Derek,
Making sure Senator Mark Warner gets reelected is our biggest Virginia race this year. According to Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight, Democrats have a real shot at taking back the U.S. Senate in November. That’s incredible, because if we can fire Mitch McConnell, we can finally get Congress working again. But if Mark loses, Democrats have no shot. If Mark’s opponent Republican Daniel Gade wins this November, we not only lose a champion for Virginia but give Donald Trump and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell another rubber stamp. Daniel Gade is against equal rights for LGBTQ+ Americans. He wants to end Medicaid expansion and take away health care from nearly 400,000 Virginians. _He even said the president's leadership on [COVID-19] has been great._ Derek, it’s clear. Daniel Gade isn’t just out of touch, when it comes to Donald Trump, he’s out of his mind. **[Can you contribute $27 or more right now and show your support for Mark Warner’s campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBrMwVGoYJzkGpGm5GaOC4G3Uejbfjaox1yXl86grMxqaMsC8xU_VhZ9ZdiYvzQWKwmnRfA8W0JI0jaWuERjryxRXLRJo5i5n00YPHk8sckEyEYRaILGLOODmbWd0hc-cs4xuVI-Hlz_ANpuTM_6z9WrffiY2hsOc7b9OWEFan36uqgdXLU110pvY2M9iQ2boLVhudZScTpl1bYS_GLMiT2vN874tZ77WA_YORuEnIpiUgxwYGuMJPAoeHUjl49yjVLtdmGcFxn175AdW2c_0NTyLMuDYFPhXq6nhtrhR2ruOWjO0OBrskYmzLepd_B4N8H3xAsNUEQ2FE8tzEFydJSvSUCL8YXcHosbNY7Z_jSG4EiCmJamrEV57okjK2Bq0/345/ZN8JciUQRtyg6MV2EewvIw/h0/vMmkQA9nrKu3URHIeTbcp0i4uMlS5bnkOcbeYYnTOrs)** Mark and I have worked closely together for years to elect more Virginia Democrats - and both of us can tell you, Virginia elections are almost always close. That includes both of our most recent campaigns statewide. We know we can’t take anything for granted and that starts with making sure Mark has the resources he needs to run a winning campaign between now and November. **[Please donate right now and show your support for Mark’s campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBrMwVGoYJzkGpGm5GaOC4G3Uejbfjaox1yXl86grMxqaMsC8xU_VhZ9ZdiYvzQWKwmnRfA8W0JI0jaWuERjry3CicigG7tIMQYo4DEv_Oghn3-dZGutC3amZdGkdv-INi0pYK3MYTEBMpYYqwu8AcQ1PaMY4YFbrftdrvbSWUsXuY_ntw7eutCm2xcTr2v5qa4m7XD8gJKXdWrXVWNeV16765zTVgu-qvpP64pzWnGr7MoVWWaRFyC_NxSP4tR_9AdZZvmLH1_Rn3VQSzpfiTM4GOcXO0oPxGg9e-9eirQwXUcgPPlqt2uHxDqAYGkvEz2CLwp8Hpj9S81kd7VisHFR6cw5JX5ymtbBM8-3G8osTfi1ddCQLik-QpYPKKGyY/345/ZN8JciUQRtyg6MV2EewvIw/h1/OhOUpu6JyMs-87jBtDDP-u5RWp8TqnwWBp-WpAQ8_xs)** Thanks, \- Terry

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882bab/2128932948/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark Warner is focused on in the Senate.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* Our nation's parks will get some much-needed relief for crucial repairs thanks to the passage of Mark's _Great American Outdoors Act_ , which was signed into law earlier this week. Now that this bill is the law of the land, our national treasures will receive funds for repairs that have been put off for years and will provide hundreds of thousands of jobs for Americans.

* Mark [spoke with military spouses](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882baa/2128932948/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.13newsnow.com/video/news/health/coronavirus/sen-mark-warner-asks-military-spouses-about-challenges-during-covid-19/291-02960fdd-c150-4225-9f14-9e5465f804ff") about the issues they face during these challenging times. Many of our military families face uncertainty when it comes to employment, and Mark will fight to ensure that active duty military and their families are protected by making a plan to increase testing and tracing of the coronavirus.

* Mark expressed his concerns about data privacy for [a contact tracing app](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882ba9/2128932948/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/local-news/richmond/contact-tracing-app-near-launch-in-virginia-as-congress-calls-for-privacy-protections/") expected to launch in Virginia this month. The app uses Bluetooth technology to notify other devices that have also downloaded the app of a potential exposure to the coronavirus. Mark has been a leader in the Senate on coronavirus-related data privacy issues, sponsoring the _Public Health Emergency Privacy Act_ , a bill to ensure the collection, retention, and use of data from screening tools is limited to combatting COVID-19.

* Mark voted for the annual defense authorization bill, known as the NDAA, [which passed with strong bi-partisan support](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882ba8/2128932948/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.virginiamercury.com/2020/08/03/congress-pushes-back-on-white-house-bid-to-cut-funding-for-virginia-class-submarines/"). The NDAA guarantees funds for the construction of two Virginia submarines, which will support shipyards in Hampton Roads and boost the local economy.

* Mark and Senator Tim Kaine cosponsored the [Real Economic Support That Acknowledges Unique Restaurant Assistance Needed to Survive (RESTAURANTS) Act](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b97/2128932948/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cbs19news.com/story/42451294/warner-kaine-cosponsoring-legislation-to-help-restaurants") this week. This bill will give $120 billion to restaurants that are struggling due to the ongoing coronavirus pandemic. It will also help with the re-employment of 11 million restaurant workers.

* Mark continues to push for safe and healthy conditions in privatized military housing. Last year, his _Ensuring Safe Housing for our Military Act_ was signed into law as part of the annual defense bill. That bill also included legislation Sen. Warner supported creating the first-ever "tenants bill of rights" for military families. [Earlier this year, he traveled to Fort Lee to meet with military families](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b96/2128932948/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.progress-index.com/story/news/2020/08/04/fort-lee-housing-upgrade/5574469002/") and keep the pressure on the military and private contractors to implement these reforms. Mark will continue working to make sure military families live in safe homes, free from mold, pests, and other hazards.

* Mark joined his Senate colleagues to push for an [extension of paid and sick leave for federal contractors and subcontractors](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b95/2128932948/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://federalnewsnetwork.com/congress/2020/08/senators-join-industry-groups-asking-for-extension-of-contractor-pay-provision/") until December 2021.

* [Mark is fighting for gig economy workers](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b94/2128932948/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-smith-propose-fix-to-covid-19-unemployment-program-that-excludes-self-employed-income/") with the _Mixed Earner Pandemic Unemployment Assistance Act_ of 2020 that he introduced with Senator Tina Smith (D-MN). This legislation will make sure that Americans who rely on a mix of traditional (W-2) and independent employment income receive financial relief made available under the Pandemic Unemployment Assistance (PUA) Program.

Just because we're physically distancing from one another doesn't mean we can't connect with our elected officials! Sen. Warner is hosting a conversation about the _Great American Outdoors Act_ for his constituents around the Commonwealth on Saturday, August 8th at 2:15 PM. [Sign up here.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b93/2128932948/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/296464/")

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b92/2128932948/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db72/53d9897e/5404434b/1c882b91/2128932948/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

Warner supported creating the first-ever "tenants bill of rights" for military families. "" and keep the pressure on the military and private contractors to implement these reforms. Mark will continue working to make sure military families live in safe homes, free from mold, pests, and other hazards. Mark joined his Senate colleagues to push for an "" until December 2021. "" with the Mixed Earner Pandemic Unemployment Assistance Act of 2020 that he introduced with Senator Tina Smith (D-MN). This legislation will make sure that Americans who rely on a mix of traditional (W-2) and independent employment income receive financial relief made available under the Pandemic Unemployment Assistance (PUA) Program. Just because we're physically distancing from one another doesn't mean we can't connect with our elected officials! Sen. Warner is hosting a conversation about the Great American Outdoors Act for his constituents around the Commonwealth on Saturday, August 8th at 2:15 PM. "" Thank you for your support. -- Team Warner | "" Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

**It’s hard to believe, but there are less than three months left until Election Day 2020. **

name: Biden 2020
subject: Peter, did you see Trump's Axios interview?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Here are the facts. |
---
Peter --

Did you catch Donald Trump's latest interview with Axios this week?

We can't blame you if you didn't. Trump lied his way through the entire interview, only making it clearer just how unhinged and untrustworthy he has become. But here are the facts, Peter:

**FACT:** Trump said "we're doing everything we can" to fight the coronavirus pandemic -- but he's pushed to cut funding for testing and the CDC, even as 1,000 Americans on average are dying per day.

**FACT:** Trump said that mail-in voting leads to "massive cheating" -- but he has no evidence for his claims. Mail-in voting is a secure, accessible way to vote during this pandemic, and even he and key members of his administration have voted by mail in the past.

**FACT:** Trump claimed to have done "more for the Black community than anybody" -- but we all know that COVID-19 has disproportionately affected Black Americans, and Trump has failed to get the virus under control.

Peter, we don't need another Axios interview to know how dangerous another four years of a Trump administration will be to the fabric of our nation. Re-electing Donald Trump this November will give him and his administration the mandate they're seeking to continue enriching themselves and their cronies at the expense of everyday Americans.

**The future of the country is on the ballot this November, Peter. Together -- but only together -- can we elect Joe Biden and set our country back on the right path.**

[If you can, please make your first $5 donation today to ensure we elect a steady, trustworthy President in Joe Biden. If you have been waiting to make your first donation, this is a powerful reason to start:](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.08_B1_axios_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.08_B1_axios_X__F1_S1_C1__nd") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Here are the facts. | Peter -- Did you catch Donald Trump's latest interview with Axios this week? We can't blame you if you didn't. Trump lied his way through the entire interview, only making it clearer just how unhinged and untrustworthy he has become. But here are the facts, Peter: FACT: Trump said "we're doing everything we can" to fight the coronavirus pandemic -- but he's pushed to cut funding for testing and the CDC, even as 1,000 Americans on average are dying per day. FACT: Trump said that mail-in voting leads to "massive cheating" -- but he has no evidence for his claims. Mail-in voting is a secure, accessible way to vote during this pandemic, and even he and key members of his administration have voted by mail in the past. FACT: Trump claimed to have done "more for the Black community than anybody" -- but we all know that COVID-19 has disproportionately affected Black Americans, and Trump has failed to get the virus under control. Peter, we don't need another Axios interview to know how dangerous another four years of a Trump administration will be to the fabric of our nation. Re-electing Donald Trump this November will give him and his administration the mandate they're seeking to continue enriching themselves and their cronies at the expense of everyday Americans. The future of the country is on the ballot this November, Peter. Together -- but only together -- can we elect Joe Biden and set our country back on the right path. It’s time to create jobs, opportunities, and a post-pandemic economy that is stronger and more competitive than ever before [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05df00fdf879411eab6731b3cfb2db89&_e=_oU2mBUVeJPfovpPccI9quIHaFAHmSj2W7ciZLFd5WWS288G_-XPGbux1u8cmz2XjpFjjpl-itJBZfWVSVGEYzDLgfb_aL3DGNyuUpD4ag4_agjJPC-SduiE6KiXOhO_jTMk0KQ-ASkA2yyfubOXAbpyBoFWh_hr0eK5Pr05CczRtvISfeY3yhEJHXViv5EMlg_RdUfWZ_H2zeYNUC2wK4BlTXmd1QA96nlQM6Gj7ljYLTQ2zZlGDiVhNMJpXca6zA2b6KpBG1TQuRuPpEpecNd3ByisV7mKIvQmoNYuEMe8t-bXMan4HH-uLO5QcNeISTYoxVBImSmf7eFiiMAWGlJxOzJ2HvF6U8T9Vse7Dvfvq1nl63m4MUh8lK1KsRvmg5LvESosA_GhtDLXdel_swbJlsRzP8PuZMj1Piw8ARb3Qsfe0h-va_Z8Ih2nTrKGtc-4wBFrInn3kJ5jcCjqZR36kw9a9FdglkER3E8XG0k%3D) | |
---
Friend,

We’re already referring to life under the pandemic as “the new normal” – but for millions of families and businesses, this is still far from normal.

Small businesses have closed at record rates since our economy shut down in March, and this is a problem that we can’t afford to let take care of itself.

Each business closed represents more jobs lost, more communities struggling, and more economic hardship.

**Economic recovery in America MUST start on Main Street – and I’m committed to making sure that our small businesses have everything they need to get our communities back on their feet moving forward.**

Friend, with Democrats transitioning to socialism and planning to raise taxes on small businesses, we can’t afford to get November wrong. Economic recovery is more critical than ever, and I need you to join me in this fight to keep our economy free and in the hands of the people.
[**CHIP IN TO HELP ME PROTECT SMALL BUSINESSES**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05df00fdf879411eab6731b3cfb2db89&_e=_oU2mBUVeJPfovpPccI9quIHaFAHmSj2W7ciZLFd5WWS288G_-XPGbux1u8cmz2XjpFjjpl-itJBZfWVSVGEYzDLgfb_aL3DGNyuUpD4ag4_agjJPC-SduiE6KiXOhO_jTMk0KQ-ASkA2yyfubOXAbpyBoFWh_hr0eK5Pr05CczRtvISfeY3yhEJHXViv5EMlg_RdUfWZ_H2zeYNUC2wK4BlTXmd1QA96nlQM6Gj7ljYLTQ2zZlGDiVhNMJpXca6zA2b6KpBG1TQuRuPpEpecHw04UOWLlnpMAqQmZYp-fxAbTVYNKW3lp20ro0vJRn8DWaQFLYoC-AaT2Md_1k2Ut7RjwuPAs-kXhbSFBAAo1WO66vFymrd1pJjn9VrN9k_aRHpCyJBN8m16A0sB90XyO1MFHMA_fkhSykaN8bztrEHxBZulC0s7ZWtM-pyr9CZp8B8MyuyydTMH-ge-Xt3gUgJroTNipnFe6PDMvu46sM%3D)
It’s time to create jobs, to create opportunities, and to create a post-pandemic economy that is stronger and more competitive than ever before.

The future of our economy depends on our votes – and I’m working to make sure that our entrepreneurs and workers get the best possible outcome going forward.

Will you join me in this fight to kickstart the great American comeback by rejecting socialism and investing in our Main Streets?
[**CHIP IN TO DEFEAT THE LEFT’S SOCIALIST ECONOMIC AGENDA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05df00fdf879411eab6731b3cfb2db89&_e=_oU2mBUVeJPfovpPccI9quIHaFAHmSj2W7ciZLFd5WWS288G_-XPGbux1u8cmz2XjpFjjpl-itJBZfWVSVGEYzDLgfb_aL3DGNyuUpD4ag4_agjJPC-SduiE6KiXOhO_jTMk0KQ-ASkA2yyfubOXAbpyBoFWh_hr0eK5Pr05CczRtvISfeY3yhEJHXViv5EMlg_RdUfWZ_H2zeYNUC2wK4BlTXmd1QA96nlQM6Gj7ljYLTQ2zZlGDiVhNMJpXca6zA2b6KpBG1TQuRuPpEpecLaCFf9SWb9BZgVy8H932tNuUiY2sSp8Ddk86SN3gDG61kOAAC1oiMMgTl4U-wLnnqLiu5gUE0ojWzx1lwZSf6TOonRNqbKNf3HaWqqwCPKRqoO5wWX9ZqcNuz4FKGsQPFbh67TPpNYsZ2rQ2-vJICfU3PJI-YVti22H3xObXktrZQsFTxtmeA8p9GcgH-uuuwrea5nqL00-YIwxwus8ukY%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30f/18e32a7f/4df2e1f4/7b210b0b/927784812/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30f/18e32a7f/4df2e1f4/7b210b08/927784812/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30f/18e32a7f/4df2e1f4/7b210b09/927784812/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30f/18e32a7f/4df2e1f4/7b210b15/927784812/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30f/18e32a7f/4df2e1f4/7b210b17/927784812/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30f/18e32a7f/4df2e1f4/7b210b0e/927784812/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Your Invitation: Virtual Meeting with Mike Huckabee, Allen West and others!
body:
Peter,
I invite you to join me and the team at My Faith Votes for an important online meeting on **Thursday, August 13.**
The election is about twelve weeks away, and the consequences of this election will be felt for generations to come. It truly is _The Election of Our Lifetime_. The contrasts have never been greater. Voters will choose between capitalism and socialism, the sanctity of life or abortion, and religious freedom or massive government control.
**We will share with you our game plan and the key strategy to reach Christians to vote in the November elections.**
We’ve gathered some of the most prominent Christian leaders in the country. The meeting speakers include **Mike Huckabee, Dr. David Jeremiah, Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Ret. Lt. Col. Allen West, and Hon. Ken Starr.** All have diligently prepared for this critical time together.
You play a critical role. We must do everything we can to reach Christians to stand strong in the face of opposition to the things of God.
It’s up to us, Christians across the country, to vote our biblical values at the polls to ensure future generations experience the same America we have experienced. Lord willing, a better America.
[Please RSVP to receive a personal link for this meeting](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUeka61HMTpwyYlMo_sz7NlW7W2V1AI02IzRTwpg82-_FTHbEyYT0qRMxUY_wbIFL4XfYnhCi253867cci5jY5cojIpA1-uMC5v4fHyeue8zaIeonD9srVdeeKxduikNaQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200808com01&n=1) taking place **LIVE at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT on August 13.**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUeka61HMTpwyYlMo_sz7NlW7W2V1AI02IzRTwpg82-_FTHbEyYT0qRMxUY_wbIFL4XfYnhCi253867cci5jY5cojIpA1-uMC5v4fHyeue8zaIeonD9srVdeeKxduikNaQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200808com01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200808com01&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200808com01&n=4).

subject: I wanted to give you this exclusive opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Friend,

I need to set the record straight.

In 2016, I was simply your voice, but YOU were the one who took our Country BACK.

Time and time again, you’ve stood by my side and shown the Left that this is YOUR Country, not theirs. You have been a fierce and loyal defender of our mission to Make America Great Again, which is why I now want to present you with a special offer to make an even BIGGER impact.

Since you’ve been such an important part of our movement, I wanted to give you this exclusive opportunity to become an Official 2020 Trump Platinum Member. When you become a member, you’ll even get your very own PERSONALIZED Membership Card.

This is the FIRST time I’ve ever opened this exclusive membership group to my online supporters. Normally, this group is reserved for just my top 500 supporters. This could be your one and only chance to join.

These membership cards are reserved for only my most loyal supporters. Your offer is ONLY available until 11:59 PM TONIGHT, so don’t wait.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9c43cc8c4de3a8e67dd3cf328aab3df7c4b34e65423b883f7c64e2025b58511f0cc45ccc37ec82fee0d7fdb525def4b2761e93250041294b

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saturday Recap: Faster Testing, Schools, and Dr. Fauci
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGJ9vch9j1VHxMdL1qVHSwNJ3p1HvzSFk06L7FZkRn7BmI_X3tJXObrb0fNuJ5R1pxU-i0sK23z5LRxO_PGOXbiMpePjQTPNU082isbLv1ydu-4KL50RVqGtwWV1wLADLChkeyUNQegRYQPszgXusyZ0pIxUazpzMpnGS-LyEHRilWQtQPiOSE_P2di1vJ4uFxSz5-BcN2il6kNTZmcR4zoJqoiqT4cN7Hs7mDOiX2saR-rMnAMDujc0bi73rudHMwaNYgbzwzpsXDYQthieuk8hZ_eoJ9j36Rdz3HCk0hwSH8P6VDaIH70KC1OnCATbTk3Yef5sesE=&c=lbucgPmLhZy_-390qwb4GVf7-y6ieTiQ_l5rKOsub4P-xskKc2cJ1g==&ch=ClQGYB5WuYkhcUHKE8-goQSFSdpnm9zwzWFxLSloeVgTMEUyLroxrA==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
FASTER TESTING

After a competitive bidding process, Rhode Island has contracted with two labs - Accu Reference and Dominion Diagnostics - that are going to majorly expand our testing capacity and guarantee us results within an average of 48 hours. Starting next week, Accu Reference and Dominion will each run 1,000 Rhode Island tests per day - 2,000 in total. By next month, Dominion will increase their capacity to 7,000 tests per day. That will bring us up to 9,000 tests - including Accu Reference, Dominion, the State Health Lab and some other private labs - that are providing results in 48 hours or less.

We are also expanding our asymptomatic testing. If you are 18-39 years old or are planning to travel to a state that requires a COVID test in order to avoid extended quarantine, you can sign up for a test at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGJ9vch9j1VHxMdL1qVHSwNJ3p1HvzSFk06L7FZkRn7BmI_X3tJXOWxTKUbNYsvLEYiirZ9Ho5SKHzzzHCHXEPpZmlB_J5s3PruyXzfSjtAOYKgXxb1RpItS-8l9Il9D3j5nMZKqn5s=&c=lbucgPmLhZy_-390qwb4GVf7-y6ieTiQ_l5rKOsub4P-xskKc2cJ1g==&ch=ClQGYB5WuYkhcUHKE8-goQSFSdpnm9zwzWFxLSloeVgTMEUyLroxrA==).
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOLS

Earlier this week, we shared the specific community metrics that will guide our decision-making at the municipal level for getting kids back into the classroom this fall. It is so important to recognize that every town and city has a unique set of circumstances, and we need to be thoughtful and targeted in our reopening plans to meet the needs of every community. Based on the input of our advisory team of health experts, and based on extensive data analysis, we determined that municipalities must have a weekly case incidence rate of fewer than 100 new cases per 100,000 people in order to fully reopen their schools. In other words, if, in the previous week, a city or town had more than 1 new case for every 1,000 residents, then they'll need to go with one of their more limited reopening options rather than bringing back every student.

I want to be very clear: we are not going to make any Rhode Island parent send their child back to school for in-person learning if they're not comfortable doing so. The Department of Education is working with school districts to ensure they have plans in place to accommodate students who choose distance learning. I hope that this alleviates some anxiety for families during this incredibly stressful time.
| | |
---|---
|
DR. FAUCI
Next Thursday at 3:00 p.m., Dr. Anthony S. Fauci, Director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) at the National Institutes of Health, will join our weekly Facebook Live forum for a discussion about how to reopen our schools in a way that balances health and safety concerns with our children's need for a high-quality education. I've been so inspired by Dr. Fauci's leadership during this crisis and during his long career in public service, and I'm looking forward to this robust and thoughtful conversation. I hope that you'll join us by watching on [my Facebook page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGJ9vch9j1VHxMdL1qVHSwNJ3p1HvzSFk06L7FZkRn7BmI_X3tJXOYeEqvj0YUg_q0HBNT6FC9vbvN3-ILxG2S20ZvNwNHTaFWiI0hGIulneC2NSLIgLY7sGC-7fZjB4OpLxMwI_BxzdM0XdLKvZ9AhKRbc691ru9n9P6syaG5Y=&c=lbucgPmLhZy_-390qwb4GVf7-y6ieTiQ_l5rKOsub4P-xskKc2cJ1g==&ch=ClQGYB5WuYkhcUHKE8-goQSFSdpnm9zwzWFxLSloeVgTMEUyLroxrA==) next Thursday.

In addition to watching this conversation, I also want to invite you to be a part of it. If you have a question you'd like me to ask Dr. Fauci, please respond to this email with it. This is an exciting opportunity for Rhode Islanders to hear directly from one of our nation's leading public health experts, and I hope you'll tune in.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGJ9vch9j1VHxMdL1qVHSwNJ3p1HvzSFk06L7FZkRn7BmI_X3tJXObrb0fNuJ5R1pxU-i0sK23z5LRxO_PGOXbiMpePjQTPNU082isbLv1ydu-4KL50RVqGtwWV1wLADLChkeyUNQegRYQPszgXusyZ0pIxUazpzMpnGS-LyEHRilWQtQPiOSE_P2di1vJ4uFxSz5-BcN2il6kNTZmcR4zoJqoiqT4cN7Hs7mDOiX2saR-rMnAMDujc0bi73rudHMwaNYgbzwzpsXDYQthieuk8hZ_eoJ9j36Rdz3HCk0hwSH8P6VDaIH70KC1OnCATbTk3Yef5sesE=&c=lbucgPmLhZy_-390qwb4GVf7-y6ieTiQ_l5rKOsub4P-xskKc2cJ1g==&ch=ClQGYB5WuYkhcUHKE8-goQSFSdpnm9zwzWFxLSloeVgTMEUyLroxrA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=6293f39e-1bd6-4455-8af7-fa7a4a3d41f9)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=6293f39e-1bd6-4455-8af7-fa7a4a3d41f9) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

We HAVE to fight back against this liberal attack on our Republican primary, and we have to hit HARD, which is why I've already called on Matt Mowers to return the dirty liberal money back to where it came from and denounce this attack. \- The entire Joe Biden for President team

We are going up on the air and online at a HISTORIC level in Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Iowa, Michigan, Minnesota, Nevada, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Texas, Virginia, and Wisconsin. That means you might be seeing our ads in your own home over the next few months leading up to Election Day! And the truth is Peter, running these ads to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump at an unprecedented scale has only been made possible by a powerful grassroots team. Everyone on Team Joe, especially Vice President Biden, is so proud that 97% of our campaign's contributions come from grassroots supporters. Because frankly, Peter, that's how a campaign should be run. Folks like you chipping in a few dollars at a time, to help win the battle for the soul of the nation. Today, we're asking you to help us build even more momentum. In the final days of the 2016 election, Donald Trump's campaign made big advertising investments in key battleground states that he ultimately flipped, and we have to be prepared to fight back to whatever last-minute moves he makes this time around. body:
Did you read Jon's message? |
---
Hi there,

Did you get a chance to read Jon's note yesterday about the importance of this election?

The federal government's abysmal response to the coronavirus pandemic has been defined by _incompetence_ , _selfishness_ , and _malevolence_.

**The problems plaguing our country are solvable, but we need new leadership in Washington to actually get the job done.**

**Jon Ossoff is committed to tackling these big problems and rooting out the corruption that's causing them.**

**[Please, read Jon's message and chip in $10 to help us win in Georgia.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2753/5b2c1286/3e8f97fd/25f1d94a/3685556594/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_07_jo_mo_ahead?refcode=em_2020_08_08_jo_mo_ahead&amount=10")**

Thanks for being part of this team,

Team Ossoff

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (personal)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** Friday, August 7
**Subject:** Friend, we can solve these problems

Friend,

**We have witnessed a catastrophic failure by the U.S. government to respond to this pandemic.**

There can be no doubt that the quality of our political leadership is a matter of life and death. So much depends on victory in November.

**Friend, the problems that need solving aren't mysterious. The solutions aren't either.**

For example: My state of Georgia faced a health care crisis even before COVID-19. 1.5 million without insurance. Families having to choose between medicine and housing. Half our counties with no OB-GYN. Sky-high maternal mortality. Rural hospitals closing.

It's no mystery how to solve these problems.

_Lawmakers could expand Medicaid, put a stop to insurance and drug companies' price gouging, build new clinics, and hire more health care workers._

**But right now, with corruption and self-dealing rampant in Washington, the priorities of politicians are not the same as the American people who send them there.**

_They rubber-stamp billions for big business, but can't come together to renew an extra $600 in unemployment benefits for ordinary Americans._

**Making health care affordable for all, breaking the link between health and wealth, ending Washington corruption, rebuilding our economy so it creates wealth for working people ... it's all possible. But it takes leadership.**

**[Friend, in the Senate I will fight to solve these problems for my constituents. I'll stand up to corporate PACs and lobbyists. I'll answer questions and criticism in public like any public servant should. If you agree that's what we need now more than ever, please chip in $20 to help me win.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2753/5b2c1286/3e8f97fd/25f1d953/3685556594/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_07_jo_mo_ahead?refcode=em_2020_08_08_jo_mo_ahead&amount=20")**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Here's why I'm supporting Joe for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390790/55b66746/26c500f3/8092245/405653437/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Friend -- You may not know this, but I was born and raised twenty minutes outside Boston. And growing up, I was inspired by the vision and voices of great leaders, presidents and senators from the great state of Massachusetts. And those powerful voices -- voices for change, voices for progress in our communities, and voices for good, moral leadership -- are needed today more than ever. That's why I'm supporting my friend Joe Kennedy, and endorsing his campaign for Senate. I can unequivocally state that Joe is one of the most powerful progressive voices in the Democratic Party today. From the moment he stepped foot on the House floor, I recognized Joe as a unique talent, as a shrewd legislator and tactician, and as a passionate warrior for justice. And I have seen how Joe has used his skill, talent and determination to fight Trump's abuses of power every single day of this presidency. Joe's voice for change is needed in the Senate now more than ever. He would use the great bully pulpit of a Massachusetts Senate seat -- and the powerful history it represents -- to demand accountability, action, and progressive change. In moments of great national urgency, like the COVID-19 pandemic or the recent protests for racial equality, Joe has been a champion for those struggling to get by and those struggling to overcome. Just like when Paul Ryan tried to rip health care away from millions of Americans or when Donald Trump started ripping children from their parents' arms at our southern border._Joe 's voice has lifted up millions of Americans. _ [**So, I 'm asking: With less than 30 days left before the September 1st primary, will you make a donation to elect Joe Kennedy and bring his leadership, commitment and progressive voice to the Senate in 2020?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390790/55b66746/26c500f3/8092246/405653437/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkma-all-email-aug2020-fr-schiff?refcode=E4414-20200803-AdamSchiff-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,Other&amount=3") | _If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately:_

We are going to need our nation's best, brightest and boldest leaders to chart a course towards progress.
We're going to need Senators who bring everything they've got to the fights of a new generation: Healthcare as a human right. Bold action on climate change. Equality for all.
**We are going to need Joe.** So let's ensure he wins on September 1st by supporting him today:

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Sen. Cornyn's "mistake"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Did he really say that?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e7d/7f51f7bc/40847ef3/4ef78575/246368204/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e7d/7f51f7bc/40847ef3/4ef78574/246368204/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200808.3nd__1876__&amount=10")
---
Peter, Sen. Cornyn called it a "mistake" to help the millions of Texans unemployed due to the COVID-19 pandemic. After months of making light of COVID-19, Cornyn is now facing the disastrous economic and public health consequences of his inaction. And instead of stepping up to the plate, he's playing politics.

**MJ knows that this is a tough time for a lot of us.** More than 3 million Texans have filed for COVID-19 related unemployment and more are filing every day. Texans need a senator who will fight hard to help them get back on their feet. **[Will you help MJ defeat Sen. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nick=20Pigeon?=
subject: We need you to get involved!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3cdf717c9b6a/we-need-you-to-get-involved?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, #TeamDani!

My name is Nick and I recently joined the team as Deputy Field Director. I am excited to work with all of you to win this race!

**Because of all of your amazing work, we've been able to make so much progress on this campaign. And we know we can do even more to flip IL-16!**

We've made over 58,000 voter contacts calls so far this summer, but we know that **we need to DOUBLE our capacity in order to fight back against Adam Kinzinger and his millions of dark money dollars.** In November, we're going to send Dani to Congress - but only if we all work together.

We need you to help us win this race by signing up to be a Team Dani Neighborhood Captain. You can help us win more votes from your neighbors and your community!

This next weekend, we have 3 training sessions scheduled for our volunteers and neighborhood captains. **Sign up for a training session, bring your friends, and help us win back this district for the people!

[Click here to sign up. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c7c2848054&e=140a9b81e7)**

Your support and your efforts have put us in a position to win. Now we need you to help us double our efforts so we can celebrate on election night!

Nick Pigeon
Deputy Field Director
#TeamDani
---
