name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: What would you like our next VP to talk about at her grassroots fundraiser with Joe?
body:
Can you take this quick survey to help us prepare for the upcoming virtual grassroots fundraiser? |
---
Peter --

You've hopefully seen our invitations to join Joe Biden and his future running mate for their very first grassroots fundraiser together.

While we can't share all the details yet, we do have a question to ask: **what do you want to hear about at the first grassroots fundraiser with the next President and Vice President of the United States?**

[If you have a minute, can you take this quick survey to help us prepare for the upcoming virtual grassroots fundraiser with Joe Biden and his running mate?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed24d/912926427/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/grassroots-fundraiser-feedback?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed24d/912926427/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/grassroots-fundraiser-feedback?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
---
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed24d/912926427/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/grassroots-fundraiser-feedback?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed24d/912926427/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/grassroots-fundraiser-feedback?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
---
Peter, the grassroots fundraisers we've already held with Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Pete Buttigieg, and Elizabeth Warren have been real highlights of the past few months.

Each grassroots fundraiser we hold is a chance for Joe to do his favorite thing -- hear your questions and answer them directly. And no matter who his running mate is, we know she'll be just as excited to meet you.

[So, can you help us make sure their first grassroots fundraiser together is a success? Let us know what you want to hear, and any other feedback you have about our grassroots fundraisers:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed24d/912926427/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/grassroots-fundraiser-feedback?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")

[https://go.joebiden.com/vp-fundraiser-feedback](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed24d/912926427/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/grassroots-fundraiser-feedback?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")

Thank you,

JoeBiden.com

P.S. If you haven't donated yet to secure your spot at this exciting grassroots fundraiser, there's still time to get a ticket! [You can click here and donate any amount to RSVP right now. ](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.08_B3_vpgrfr-survey_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed249/912926427/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed247/912926427/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed245/912926427/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed244/912926427/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed242/912926427/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed23f/912926427/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed23d/912926427/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb1c/1cd0ac28/17e6e69df/357ed23f/912926427/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._
clean_body: Can you take this quick survey to help us prepare for the upcoming virtual grassroots fundraiser? | Peter -- You've hopefully seen our invitations to join Joe Biden and his future running mate for their very first grassroots fundraiser together. While we can't share all the details yet, we do have a question to ask: what do you want to hear about at the first grassroots fundraiser with the next President and Vice President of the United States? "" | "" "" | "" Peter, the grassroots fundraisers we've already held with Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Pete Buttigieg, and Elizabeth Warren have been real highlights of the past few months. Each grassroots fundraiser we hold is a chance for Joe to do his favorite thing -- hear your questions and answer them directly. And no matter who his running mate is, we know she'll be just as excited to meet you. "" "" Thank you, JoeBiden.com P.S. If you haven't donated yet to secure your spot at this exciting grassroots fundraiser, there's still time to get a ticket! "" | | "" "" "" "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
